intro: Two quick questions to build a first-semester plan.

questions.text: Did this student take both Biology and Chemistry in high school?
Is this student interested in medical school (pre-med)?

routes.note: CHM 121 must begin first semester — the chemistry sequence (121 → 122 → 221 → 321) must finish before MCAT prep junior year.
BIO 155 is the standard entry point for students with prior high school biology and chemistry.
BIO 100 or 120 first to build the foundation. CHM 121 must still begin this semester to keep pre-med timing on track.
BIO 100 or BIO 120 builds the foundation before proceeding to the core sequence.
